title: 10. LLMOps — disciplines map (this repo)
description: Deterministic GraphRAG core + optional LLM path; enforce quality outside the model.
story:
LLMOps is not 'call OpenAI from a script.' It is the operating system around models:
versioned prompts, model registry, guardrails, evals, budgets, observability, and CI gates.

THIS APP (ADR 0001):
• Core diagnosis is deterministic GraphRAG + FMEA/Bayes — NOT free-form LLM reasoning.
• LLM path is READY-BUT-INACTIVE (llm_enabled=false by default) for wording/gateway.
• Security and quality live in code (guardrails/, evals/, finops/), not in 'please be safe' prompts alone.

Packages: guardrails/, evals/, observability/, gateway/, prompts/, finops/, docs/sdd/09-PLATFORM-LLMOPS.md
one_liner: GraphRAG primary; LLM optional; enforce outside the model; version artifacts; gate with evals.
why_it_matters: Warranty answers must be auditable and reproducible.
Optional LLM still needs budgets, rate limits, and redaction.
Interviews: know discipline map + as-built status ACTIVE vs READY.
say_aloud: Primary diagnose path does not require an LLM.
LLM_ENABLED defaults to false; gateway and PromptOps are ready-but-inactive.
Guardrails and evals enforce quality outside the model.
Prompts and model aliases are versioned git artifacts.

cheat_sheet.meaning: Wired and on by default (obs, guardrails, eval smoke)
Code present; off until flag (gateway, PromptOps)

beats.title: Discipline → package (memorize)
beats.goal: Map each discipline to a folder.
beats.code:
Observability   ACTIVE     observability/ + /metrics + OTEL opt-in
Guardrails      ACTIVE     guardrails/
EvalOps         ACTIVE     evals/ + thresholds.yaml
Security docs   ACTIVE     security/ + OWASP LLM mapping
Gateway/ModelOps READY     gateway/ + models/registry.yaml
PromptOps       READY      prompts/ + promptops/
FinOps          READY path finops/budget.py (trips when LLM spends)
RAGOps (graph)  ACTIVE     graph/ GraphRAG (not vector-only RAG)
CI/CD           ACTIVE     .github/workflows/ci.yml + cd.yml
Progressive del WIRED      deploy/rollouts/ + eval-gate
IaC             SCAFFOLD   infra/terraform/
beats.say_after: ACTIVE vs READY is the honesty test.

line_quiz.prompt: Is the model gateway on by default?
line_quiz.answer: No — READY but inactive until llm_enabled
choices: No — READY but inactive until llm_enabled

concepts.definition: Filters, budgets, auth, and evals in software — not prompt-only hope.
concepts.say_aloud: Never rely on the model alone for safety or budget.

common_mistakes: Calling this product an LLM chatbot as the core engine.

further_reading.title: docs/sdd/09-PLATFORM-LLMOPS.md (code-true map)
further_reading.takeaway: Use SDD 09 + AS_BUILT, not the whole handbook every session.

further_reading.title: ADR 0001 adopt LLMOps disciplines
further_reading.takeaway: Deterministic core + optional LLM + gate non-determinism.

final_boss: Recite ACTIVE vs READY disciplines with paths.
